scripts.test:load:full: k6 run tests/load/health-check.js; k6 run tests/load/auth-endpoints.js; k6 run tests/load/staff-management.js; k6 run tests/load/questionnaire-api.js; k6 run tests/load/combined-stress.js

comments.overrides: SEC-1+SEC2-2: fast-xml-parser >=5.5.6 for AWS SDK CVEs (GHSA-8gc5-j5rx-235r incomplete fix bypass). socket.io-parser >=4.2.6 for unbounded binary attachments (GHSA-677m). path-to-regexp >=0.1.13 for ReDoS via express (GHSA-37ch). picomatch >=2.3.2/>=4.0.4 for ReDoS via extglob (GHSA-c2c7). minimatch for ReDoS via google-auth-library. rollup for path traversal (dev-only). vite >=7.3.2 for server.fs.deny bypass (GHSA-v2wj) + WebSocket file read (GHSA-p9ff). drizzle-orm >=0.45.2 for SQL injection via improperly escaped identifiers (GHSA-gpj5).
comments.accepted-risks: qs (LOW arrayLimit bypass, via express->body-parser — no fix without Express 5 major version change). xlsx (devDep only — one-time migration, CVE-2023-30533 prototype pollution). serialize-javascript (dev-only via workbox-build). esbuild (dev-only via tsx/vite). ajv (dev-only via eslint). phin (dev-only via potrace/jimp).
